image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about VO2 max basics.
Context visual: VO2 max measures your body’s ability to utilize oxygen during intense exercise. But why does that matter?
Escalation visual: Higher VO2 max means better endurance and performance. Think of elite athletes versus casual runners.
Evidence visual: Research shows that VO2 max can predict longevity. The fitter you are, the longer you may live.
Payoff visual: So, improving your VO2 max isn’t just about better workouts—it’s about a healthier life.
Cta visual: Want to learn more about boosting your fitness? Follow for tips and strategies!
